Planning pipeline complete. Story persisted and `agent::ready`.

## Summary

Ran **only** the `/plan` pipeline headlessly (no delivery), auto-proceeding through both HITL gates under `--yes`.

**Story #1 — "Minimal ESM HTTP server returning "Hello, World!" on GET /"**
- URL: https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-23-hello-world-mandrel-81fda174/issues/1
- Route: **lite** (trivial single-artifact scope), state: **agent::ready**
- Cohort label: `plan-run::4295cac7`

**Pipeline steps:**
1. **Interrogate** — `plan-context.js`: `complexityRoute: lite`, no duplicate Stories, no source tickets.
2. **Author** — one cohesive Story (default-single policy): `server.js` (creates) + `package.json` (refactors-existing — it already exists with `"type": "module"`, needs the `start` script). Acceptance covers PORT/default-3000, 200 status, `text/html`, exact `Hello, World!` body, and the single-file/no-framework constraint.
3. **Critics** — consolidation & pre-mortem both `dispatch: false` (skips ledgered); text-hygiene clean.
4. **Persist** — dry-run passed all gates, then real persist created the issue.

**Two mid-run corrections:** `verify[]` entries needed a trailing `(tier)` tag; and the `package.json` change assumption was flipped from `creates` to `refactors-existing` since the file already exists at base.

One non-fatal warning: the `route::lite` label couldn't be applied (`gh` label-ensure exited 1) — the Story was created without it. Add it by hand if the marker matters.

Next step (not run this session): `/deliver 1`.

Story #1 landed. Single-Story run, so no per-run epilogue.

## Delivery complete — Story #1 `landed`

The existing plan for the minimal ESM HTTP server was delivered end-to-end:

- **Implementation** (`story-1` worktree): `server.js` (Node `node:http`, ESM, no framework) + `package.json` `start` script. Existing `"type": "module"` already satisfied.
- **Verify evidence** — `node --check` passed; `PORT=3100` → HTTP 200, `Content-Type: text/html`, body containing `Hello, World!`; default port 3000 confirmed.
- **Acceptance self-eval** — fresh-context `acceptance-critic` scored all 6 ACs `met`; gate returned `decision: proceed` (round 1/2).
- **Close & land** — all gates passed (typecheck, lint, format, test, check-baselines); code review 0 findings; PR #2 auto-merged (squash) to `main`; Story flipped to `agent::done`.

**Terminal envelope:**

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| status | `landed` |
| PR | [#2](https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-23-hello-world-mandrel-81fda174/pull/2) — MERGED, checks success |
| gates | validation ✓ · baseSync ✓ · codeReview ✓ |
| tail | followUps ✓ · statusResync ✓ · refCleanup ✓ · baseFastForward degraded (dirty tree — merge stands) |

The only degradation is a cosmetic post-land `main` fast-forward skip (working tree has the untracked `temp/` dir); the merge itself is confirmed and the Story is done.
